description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx, visualize revenue targets by creating a workbook named 'Revenue_Targets' in My Folders. The workbook should feature a horizontal bar chart of 'Revenue' by 'Product Category' with two reference lines: one for the average revenue across categories labeled 'Category Average', and a constant reference line at 300,000 labeled 'Target: $300K'.
